title: Investments
description: Manage and track your investment portfolio
selectPlan: Select a plan to start investing
plans_subtitle: Choose a curated plan matched to your goals and risk tolerance
curating_portfolios: We're curating new portfolios. Talk to an advisor to get matched
no_fees_withdraw_anytime: No fees to fund • Withdraw anytime
select_plans_description: Select from our carefully curated investment options tailored to your risk tolerance and financial goals. All plans support flexible durations from 7 days to 12 months with higher returns on longer commitments.
pro_tip: 💡 Pro Tip: Each plan shows minimum and maximum investment limits. Select your desired investment amount and choose how long you want to invest (7 days to 12 months). Longer durations offer significantly higher returns!
track_monitor_positions: Track and monitor your ongoing investment positions
no_investments_description: You don't have any active investments yet. Start by choosing a plan from the Investment Plans tab to begin growing your portfolio.
calculate_potential_returns: Calculate potential returns and plan your investment strategy
analyze_investment_performance: Analyze your investment performance and growth over time
start_investing_for_portfolio: Start by investing in one of our plans to build your portfolio and see performance analytics.
explore_plans_grow_portfolio: Explore our investment plans and grow your portfolio further
review_detailed_analytics: Review detailed analytics of all your active investment positions
will_start_immediately: Your investment will start immediately after confirmation.
